ques: Calculate the final position and velocity of a projectile launched at 45 degrees with an initial speed of 30 m/s after 3 seconds.
answer: After 3 s, position ≈ (63.6 m horizontal, 19.5 m vertical); velocity components vₓ ≈ 21.2 m/s, v_y ≈ −8.22 m/s (descending), giving a speed of ≈ 22.75 m/s.
